settings.title: Pay via UPI
settings.summary: Fast checkout using popular UPI apps.

settings.title: Cash on Delivery (COD)
settings.summary: Pay ₹100 now, and the rest on delivery.

settings.methods_intro: We support quick, secure checkout across UPI, cards, netbanking, and more.
settings.methods_notes: Available payment methods may vary by order value or account history. COD may be disabled for repeated rejections or high return patterns.
settings.security_intro: We invest in best-in-class systems and certifications to keep your data safe.
settings.sec_point2: Card data is never stored on our servers.
settings.security_note: If a payment fails, your bank may place a temporary hold. It will auto-reverse as per their timelines.
settings.inv_intro: We provide invoices for in-store and online purchases.
settings.inv_store: Visit any store with your receipt to request an invoice copy.
settings.inv_online: Place your order using your details. If you need a business invoice, choose 'Purchase as a company' and fill in GST details.
settings.gift_intro: Use virtual or physical gift cards and store credits seamlessly at checkout.
settings.gift_point1: Store credits never expire and can be combined with other payment methods.
settings.gift_point2: Apply your code in the 'Gift card or discount code' box at checkout.
settings.gift_point3: If your order exceeds the credit balance, pay the remaining amount using any other method.
settings.credit_help_text: Lost your code? Contact support and we’ll help you retrieve it.
settings.help_text: Can’t find what you’re looking for?

settings.label: Key takeaways

settings.item2: Use at your own risk: we don’t guarantee error-free or uninterrupted access, accuracy, or timeliness.
settings.item3: We’re not responsible for third-party sites linked from our website.
settings.item4: To the maximum extent permitted by Indian law, we’re not liable for direct, indirect, incidental, special, exemplary, or consequential losses.
settings.item5: We’re not liable for allergies/reactions or issues arising from materials or use of products.
settings.item6: Availability isn’t guaranteed; the site may experience faults, delays, viruses, or outages; confidentiality of transmissions isn’t guaranteed.

settings.content: By using this website, you agree that Lagorii provides the site, its content, and any products “as is,” without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied (including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement). We do not warrant that the site will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, current, accurate, or free of viruses or other harmful components, and your use is at your own risk. We are not responsible for the accuracy, completeness, performance, or timeliness of information on this site or on any third-party websites linked from it, and the inclusion of a link does not imply endorsement. To the maximum extent permitted by law (under Indian law), Lagorii is not liable for any decision, action, inaction, loss, cost, or damage of any kind—whether direct, indirect, incidental, special, exemplary, or consequential—arising from or in connection with your use or misuse of the site or materials, loss or modification of data, technical defects, viruses, network failures, service interruptions, product availability, or loss of confidentiality in transmissions. We are not liable for injury, illness, or allergic reactions related to materials (e.g., leather, fabric, hardware) or product use. We do not guarantee the site will be available in any location, free from faults or unauthorized access, or free from blockages, delays, congestion, or interference. Where some laws do not allow limitations on warranties or liabilities, these limits apply only to the extent permitted.
